title: Alliance Network News
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Alliance Network News''', or '''ANN''', was an electronic news service that sent news updates to members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

{{Reb-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
